    • org.apache.dubbo.cache中Adaptive的使用

      注释类型为Adaptive的org.apache.dubbo.cache中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Cache CacheFactory.getCache(URL url, Invocation invocation)
      CacheFactory implementation class needs to implement this return underlying cache instance for method against url and invocation.

      Object Codec.decode(Channel channel, InputStream input)
      已过时。 
      Decode message.
      ChannelHandler Dispatcher.dispatch(ChannelHandler handler, URL url)

      注释类型为Adaptive的org.apache.dubbo.rpc中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      <T> Exporter<T> Protocol.export(Invoker<T> invoker)
      Export service for remote invocation:
      1.

      create proxy.
      <T> T ProxyFactory.getProxy(Invoker<T> invoker, boolean generic)
      create proxy.
      <T> Invoker<T> Protocol.refer(Class<T> type, URL url)
      Refer a remote service:
      1.

      get the configurator instance.

      <T> Invoker<T> Cluster.join(Directory<T> directory)
      Merge the directory invokers to a virtual invoker.

      select one invoker in list.
